auth.invalid_refresh: Session could not be refreshed, please sign in again
agenda.duplicate_bill: You already added {title} this month. Are you sure?
social.wallet_not_member: You are not a member of this shared wallet
social.not_owner: You must be the wallet owner for this action
social.already_owner: This member is already the wallet owner
social.member_not_in_wallet: Member is not part of this shared wallet
auth.pin_too_short: PIN must be at least 4 digits
auth.password_too_weak: Password must be at least 8 characters and not all digits
auth.rate_limited: Too many attempts. Please wait a moment.
auth.unsupported_locale: Unsupported locale. Use tr or en.
auth.password_reset_sent: If the email is registered, a reset link has been sent
auth.password_reset_success: Your password has been updated. You can sign in with your new password
auth.invalid_reset_token: Reset link is invalid or expired
error.rate_limited: Too many requests. Please wait a moment.
input.voice_processed_success: Voice command processed and saved to TalkCash!
ocr.file_too_large: Receipt image is too large (max 10 MB)
ocr.external_image: External receipt image cannot be served from this endpoint
wallet.invalid_amount: Amount must be greater than zero
wallet.invalid_transfer: Cannot transfer within the same wallet
wallet.non_zero_balance: Cannot delete a wallet with non-zero balance
premium_required: This feature requires a premium plan
billing.google_not_configured: Google Play verification is not configured
billing.purchase_already_claimed: This purchase is linked to another account
billing.premium_required: This feature is only available to TalkCash Premium members.
billing.subscription_expired: Your subscription has expired. Please renew.
workspace.forbidden: You do not have admin access to this workspace
invitation.email_mismatch: This invitation was sent to a different email address
shopping.no_items_to_import: No items to import from receipt
shopping.suggest_speech: You added {product}. Should we add {suggested} too?
confirm.manual_edit: AI could not fully parse your input. Please edit amount and description.
price_compare.speech_higher: Added {product} to {current_store}{name_part}. Quick note: you last bought this at {previous_store} for {previous_price} TRY. {current_store} is {percent}% more expensive right now.
price_compare.speech_lower: Added {product} to {current_store}{name_part}. It was {previous_price} TRY at {previous_store} — {diff} TRY cheaper here, {percent}% savings. Nice deal!
ai.forecast_negative: At this spending rate, your balance may go negative by month end.
ai.price_increased: Your {product} purchases are up {percent}% vs last month.
ai.price_decreased: Your {product} purchases are down {percent}% vs last month.
ai.chat_offline: AI mentor is unavailable. Configure OPENAI_API_KEY or use budget/agenda screens.
notif.premium_expires_soon_body: Your subscription ends in {days} day(s). Open Settings to renew.
notif.premium_expires_today_body: Renew today to keep your premium features.
notif.premium_grace_body: Your subscription is on hold due to a payment problem. Renew by {date}.
notif.premium_expired_body: Premium features are disabled. Open Settings to subscribe again.
notif.retention_evening_body: Don't waste time typing every expense. Whisper to TalkCash in 5 seconds and keep your budget up to date!
notif.retention_weekly_title: 📊 Your weekly finance report is ready!
notif.retention_weekly_body: Curious which category you spent the most on this week? Tap to see your AI analysis.
notif.retention_weekly_smart_top: This week {category} made up {pct}% of your spending. Your AI summary is ready — tap to view.
notif.retention_weekly_smart_over_save: You went {pct}% over budget on {category} this week, but saved big on {save_category}! ☕📉
notif.retention_persona_angry_mom_title: 🤨 Is there no food at home?
notif.retention_persona_angry_mom_body: Eating out spending hit the roof this week! Are we picking money off the street? Let's talk savings.
notif.retention_persona_wall_street_body: You overspent your budget this week. Open the app to see what stocks that money could have bought.
notif.retention_paywall_body: Don't hit your AI limits — manage your budget without boundaries with today's special offer.
export.title: TalkCash Financial Report — {name}
export.col.title: Title
nlp.openai_required: OpenAI API key required. Set OPENAI_API_KEY environment variable.
nlp.stt_required: Voice commands require GROQ_API_KEY or OPENAI_API_KEY.
sync.conflict_shopping: '{name}' was already completed on the server. Which version should be kept?
micro_savings.speech: If you choose {alternative}, you could move {saved} to your {target} wallet.
micro_savings.nudge_limit: Daily smart-savings nudge limit reached. Upgrade to Pro for unlimited nudges.
portfolio.no_investment: No balance in investment wallets yet. Try micro-savings nudges after spending.
portfolio.tilt_gold: Gold is {current}% of your investment slice — route the next saving to Gold to move toward target.
portfolio.tilt_forex: Gold is {current}% of investments, above target — consider sending the next saving to Forex.
portfolio.balanced: Your gold/forex mix looks close to target. Keep this pace.
portfolio.low_investment_share: Only {percent}% of assets are in investment wallets. Small regular transfers can raise that share.
portfolio.high_debt: Credit card debt is pressuring cash balance. Prioritize debt reduction first.
portfolio.disclaimer: These tips are educational only; not investment advice.
micro_savings.round_up_speech: Round up to {rounded} and you could move {spare} to your {target} wallet.
micro_savings.broker_disclaimer: You will be redirected to an external app. TalkCash is not a broker.
micro_savings.simulation_disclaimer: Educational projection only; not investment advice.
micro_savings.credit_card_source: Micro-savings cannot transfer from a credit card.
micro_savings.invalid_target_wallet: Target wallet must be an investment wallet.
roadmap.already_voted: You have already voted for this feature
roadmap.voting_not_allowed: Voting is not open for this feature
subscription.reminder_speech: {name}, {provider} will charge {amount} TRY in two days. Cancel now if you want!
subscription.reminder_body: {name}{provider} will charge {amount} TRY in two days. Cancel now if you want!
